Video.summary: Tensions run high in the courtroom as Gayla and James decide if they should call off their wedding.
Video.title: Williams vs. Edwards

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: A broken gaming console and a stolen laptop have exes Dominique and Deon standing before the judges.
Video.title: Childress vs. Alston

Video.summary: Complaints of excessive weight gain have Georgia couple Tasha and Prez at odds.
Video.title: Mack vs. Tate

Video.summary: Jahnasia confronts Kelechi about his sudden emotional distance and possible betrayal after years of planning a future together.
Video.title: Arnold vs. Ijomah

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Cate sues Ann Rosa for $1,140, claiming Ann sold her a defective pellet stove, misrepresenting it as functional. Ann argues the stove worked when sold, and any issues are Cate’s responsibility.
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Faulty Stove

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: Mikaela is suing her hair dresser after she left mid-service for a DUI class, and now her hair is falling out.
Video.title: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Image.alt: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Video.summary: First, an alleged hit and run. Then, a plaintiff claims the defendant left house in shambles.
Video.title: In Shambles

Video.summary: Shawdae and Travis' relationship began with a fight and will end in one, which is why they've asked for the Cutlers' help.
Video.title: McGraw vs. Herrington

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: A once-thriving relationship teeters on the edge as accusations of infidelity and neglect come to light in court.
Video.title: Osborne vs. Osborne

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: Choreographer Bryant sues ex-girlfriend and R&B artist Olivia for non-payment of services rendered for a music video.
Video.title: Huey vs. Walker

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: After multiple incidences of cheating resulted in a breakup, Aamonie accuses ex-girlfriend Averiona of stealing her pet dog.
Video.title: Kemper vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Herve Ambwa is accusing his counsin of selling his beloved Wii gaming console Irvin swears he would never do such a thing and that is was stolen due to his roommates negligence.
Video.title: What Happened to the Wii?

Video.summary: Two sisters who were once tight are now torn apart. Silcray claims her younger sister stole her belongings. Sylvia is shocked and appaled that she'd be accused of such claims after taking her sister into her home.
Video.title: The Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Priscilla is suing her disabled mother for the money she borrowed to purchase her wheelchair.
Video.title: Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Image.alt: Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Video.summary: Friends Matt and James said everything was ok until their other roommate, David, turned into Goliath and became a violent religious fanatic, slinging shoes and punching faces.
Video.title: The Christian Crusader

Video.summary: A woman sues a former friend after bailing him out of jail.
Video.title: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Image.alt: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Video.summary: Kim Savage claims her brother John owes her rent and money for appliances, while John argues that he paid the rent and wants to be compensated for the emotional distress he encountered when he and his three children were tossed out on the street.
Video.title: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Image.alt: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Video.summary: First, these cousins clash over cash then they spar over cars and finally they moan over loans.
Video.title: Clash of the Cousins

Video.summary: Sarah is suing her former friend for the bail money that she posted for him.
Video.title: Bail Bonds Break Bonds

Video.summary: It's music biz mayhem when two men tangle over their boy band. Was it a record label rip off?
Video.title: The Reunion of Swag Kids

Video.summary: When a wife sues her own husband, the gloves come off and there are no rules...accept his. Now find out who wins when Judge Karen rules on him.
Video.title: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Image.alt: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Video.summary: They were old time band buddies that had a rockin new idea, then they say an old band buddy lured them in with a sweet song, but when his tune fell flat, they fell between a Rock N' Roll and a hard place.
Video.title: Band Buddy Battle!

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: Shawn sues Andrew for $4,545, claiming Andrew's dog bit him, injuring his finger and knuckle. Andrew argues Shawn's unleashed dog started the scuffle and insists Shawn's own dog caused the bite.
Video.title: Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!

Image.alt: Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!
Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!
Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!

Video.summary: Mary sues Theresa for $5,000, claiming she stole her three beloved dogs. Theresa says Mary gave them away after losing her home and refuses to return them or pay. It's a heartbroken owner versus a "kindhearted" caretaker in this canine battle.
Video.title: Dog-Sitting Disaster

Video.summary: Dwayne sues his niece and her husband for $2,570, claiming they damaged his apartment and owe rent. The defendants argue the apartment had lead paint, harmed their child, and they paid in full. They countersue for $3,000 in damages.
Video.title: Family Feuding Over Rental

Video.summary: Jamar and Dana sue Marlene and Myriah for $1,200 after a failed puppy deal. They claim Marlene reneged on giving them puppies as agreed. Marlene argues the pups were gifts and refuses to comply.
Video.title: Dog Mating Disaster

Video.summary: Corinne sues ex-boss Walter for $5,000, claiming unpaid wages, harassment, and abuse. Walter denies the claims, asserting he paid her and countersues for $545.04, accusing her of a shakedown.
Video.title: Harassed by Her Boss?

Video.summary: Claudette is suing her neighbor for jumping her and falsely accusing her of pullling a gun on her daughter.
Video.title: Gunning for Her Neighbor

Video.summary: Ebony is here to get help for her brother who's opioid addiction worsened after his wife overdosed.
Video.title: Hooked on Opioids

Video.summary: Ansyl is suing his former tenant for two months' rent saying she was working as a prostitute while renting.
Video.title: Ransacked by a Landlord

Video.summary: A photographer says the defendants told her their wedding ceremony was canceled due to the pandemic, so she refunded their money; she now believes that was a lie, so she's suing.
Video.title: Save the Fake Date

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: Liatwanne petitions the court for rehab for her son, saying he's an addict who started using drugs as a teen.
Video.title: Running with the Wrong Crowd

Video.summary: Eleanor believes that the defendant may be the daughter of her brother, who has been deceased for 18 years.
Video.title: Trying to Make It Official
